evals.prompt: I'm building a landing page for a new product and I need a hero section at the top with a background image. Can you show me what hero block options are available?
evals.expected_output: List hero blocks with URLs, specifically highlighting the image-based hero blocks (hero-image, hero-bg-image, hero-bg-image-light). Should point to the exact raw GitHub URLs.

evals.prompt: I need to build a CTA (call-to-action) section for my page. What are my options? I want to see what styles and layouts are available.
evals.expected_output: List all 8 CTA block options with descriptions, organized by type (contained vs full-bleed) and aligned vs center options. Include raw GitHub URLs for each.

evals.prompt: I'm designing a dashboard page with multiple sections. I need a header, some feature blocks showing product benefits, and a stats section at the bottom. Which blocks should I use?
evals.expected_output: Suggest header blocks, feature blocks (with various image ratios and layouts), and stats blocks. Provide links to specific blocks and explain the grid ratios for feature blocks.
